title: Dom Discs
description: A mod adding custom music discs
body:
❓ **What's this mod?**
Have you ever saw [T_en_M's](https://youtube.com/@tenm?si=Cu_zKRvtWSwEsQH2) music disc video, and wondered "Man i wish this would be a mod". Well, now it is! enjoy [T_en_M's](https://youtube.com/@tenm?si=Cu_zKRvtWSwEsQH2) music discs inside of minecraft! 

⚒️ crafting:
> blank disc is made by surrounding quartz by any type of stone **NOT COBBLE**
> music disc is made by having a blank disc and putting an associated item next to it

🔑 Key features:
- Vannila freindly recipes
- ~~jei/rei compatibility~~

📀 currently added discs:
no escape (lava bucket) 
voyage (sand around)
Breeze (snowball)

❗DISCLAMER❗This project is just a side project dont expect constant updates!
